---
title: "Paper II — Geometry Forces Physics"
description: >-
  Derives the Standard Model gauge group SU(3) × SU(2) × U(1) from
  a single conservation axiom on the A=1 Discrete Causal Lattice.
  Leaves the gauge-coupling prefactor open for the planned
  discrete-probability paper.
draft: true
---

<!--
  Draft landing page for Paper II. Does not render to the live site
  while `draft: true` is set.

  Current Zenodo version: v1.01. Prior version v1.0 has its own DOI;
  both are listed below. If a future v1.n revision is deposited, add
  another prior-version line and update Version + DOI; see the
  papers card pattern in `papers/index.qmd` for the matching format.
-->

## Abstract

<!-- Verbatim from the v1.01 Zenodo deposit's abstract. -->

## What this paper establishes

- **Gauge group from a conservation axiom.** <One paragraph on how
  $SU(3) \times SU(2) \times U(1)$ is *derived*, not assumed, from
  the lattice's single conservation invariant.>
- **The 71-dimensional per-site automorphism algebra.** <One
  paragraph naming the algebra structure and its connection to the
  generator-zoo catalog paper.>
- **What remains open.** The gauge-coupling prefactor $c$ — closure
  is the centerpiece of the planned discrete-probability paper.

## Methodological role

Second step in the arc: *geometry forces physics*. <One paragraph
locating Paper II as the substrate-to-Standard-Model step.>

## Audit-row impact

<List the audit rows that flipped to **PASS** with v1.01, one per
line. Note any rows that changed state between v1.0 and v1.01.>

## What changed in v1.01 vs v1.0

<One paragraph or short bullet list of the revision's scope. This
mirrors the news-post change-log but lives here as the persistent
reference; the news post is the announcement, this page is the
record.>

## Open questions deferred downstream

- **Gauge-coupling prefactor $c$.** Centerpiece of the planned
  discrete-probability paper.
- **Proton internals.** Future paper consuming Paper II's SU(3)
  machinery and the generator-zoo catalog.
- <Other downstream consumers as they're decided.>

## Citation and version

- **Version:** v1.01
- **DOI:** [10.5281/zenodo.20292158](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20292158)
- **Prior-version DOI:** [10.5281/zenodo.20240736](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.20240736) (v1.0)
- **Repository:** [JackDMenendez/dcl-paper-02-sm-derivation](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/dcl-paper-02-sm-derivation)
- **GitHub release:** [v1.01](https://github.com/JackDMenendez/dcl-paper-02-sm-derivation/releases/tag/v1.01)

The canonical citation lives on the Zenodo deposit page; export
BibTeX / RIS / CSL from there. The concept DOI on Zenodo resolves
to the latest version automatically.
